package.name: state_space_response_viz
package.description: Source-agnostic playback of RobotTrajectory files (the framework's canonical motion-interchange format) into RViz: a player node publishes interpolated JointState frames with play/pause/seek/speed transport control. Consumes only the trajectory format — it does not care whether the trajectory came from a linear state-space simulation, a nonlinear simulator, or a recorded log.
